issues.title: Bug: Terminal clickable URLs not detected + Ctrl+V/Ctrl+C clipboard shortcuts not firing

note: Single-issue follow-up to v0.5.5. Speculative fix for the clickable-URLs symptom of #169 via `allowProposedApi: true` on the XTerm constructor. Ctrl+V / Ctrl+Shift+C remain unverified — to be triaged in a future release if still broken.
